title: kickxia fruticosa
intro: Kickxia fruticosa, also known as the sticky catchfly or sticky gerardia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Kickxia fruticosa is believed to provide several health benefits, including relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Kickxia fruticosa are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use.
